flow.name: prc-cancel-customer-order-flow
flow.doc:name: PRC Cancel Customer Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Validates order ownership then delegates to orders-sys-api to set status CANCELLED. Order is not deleted.

http:listener.doc:name: PATCH /customers/{customerId}/orders/{orderId}/cancel
http:listener.doc:description: Inbound REST call to cancel an order — sets CANCELLED status without deleting the record

set-variable.doc:name: Store customerId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures customerId URI param for ownership validation

http:request.doc:name: Fetch order for ownership check
http:request.doc:description: Retrieves the order to verify it belongs to the specified customer before cancelling

set-variable.doc:name: Capture order check status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores orders-sys-api response status for routing

choice.doc:name: Order found + owned?
choice.doc:description: Validates order exists and belongs to this customer before cancelling

when.doc:name: Not found or wrong customer
when.doc:description: Order does not exist or does not belong to this customer

set-variable.doc:name: Set 404
set-variable.doc:description: Order not found or ownership mismatch

ee:transform.doc:name: 404 body
ee:transform.doc:description: JSON 404 error for order not found or not owned

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "Not Found", message: "Order '" ++ vars.orderId ++ "' not found for customer '" ++ vars.customerId ++ "'", statusCode: 404 }

otherwise.doc:name: Valid — cancel order
otherwise.doc:description: Order verified, delegate cancellation to orders-sys-api

http:request.doc:name: PATCH cancel order → sys API
http:request.doc:description: Calls orders-sys-api to set the order status to CANCELLED

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores response status from orders-sys-api cancel operation

flow.name: prc-delete-customer-order-flow
flow.doc:name: PRC Delete Customer Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Validates order ownership then permanently deletes the order via orders-sys-api

http:listener.doc:name: DELETE /customers/{customerId}/orders/{orderId}
http:listener.doc:description: Inbound REST call to permanently delete an order scoped to a customer

set-variable.doc:name: Store customerId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures customerId URI param for ownership validation

http:request.doc:name: Fetch order for ownership check
http:request.doc:description: Retrieves the order to verify it belongs to the specified customer before deleting

set-variable.doc:name: Capture order check status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores orders-sys-api response status for routing

choice.doc:name: Order found + owned?
choice.doc:description: Validates order exists and belongs to this customer before deleting

when.doc:name: Not found or wrong customer
when.doc:description: Order does not exist or does not belong to this customer

set-variable.doc:name: Set 404
set-variable.doc:description: Order not found or ownership mismatch

ee:transform.doc:name: 404 body
ee:transform.doc:description: JSON 404 error for order not found or not owned

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "Not Found", message: "Order '" ++ vars.orderId ++ "' not found for customer '" ++ vars.customerId ++ "'", statusCode: 404 }

otherwise.doc:name: Valid — delete order
otherwise.doc:description: Order verified, delegate deletion to orders-sys-api

http:request.doc:name: DELETE order → sys API
http:request.doc:description: Calls orders-sys-api to permanently delete the order

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores response status from orders-sys-api delete
